description_long: This object is a modern, tactical-style shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular frame. The barrel is relatively short and features a prominent vented rail system beneath it, likely for mounting accessories such as lights or grips. The grip is ergonomic, textured, and appears to be made of a polymer material, designed for secure handling. The trigger guard is rounded and generously sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from metal, with visible screws and mechanical details indicating a solid, functional build. The shotgun lacks a traditional full stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for compactness and maneuverability in urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical black shotgun with a vented rail, ergonomic pistol grip, and robust metal construction. It features a short barrel and a large, rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, vented rail, and the alignment of the barrel with the pistol grip beneath.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the vented rail, and the ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grip, the trigger guard, and the sight alignment along the top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the receiver, barrel, and the detailed grip texture, similar to the left side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented rail system beneath the barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, large, and elongated with smooth edges and ample space
